Code Rule Block.description: Create a new code rule block

File Rule Block.description: Create a new file rule block

Custom Rule Block.description: Create a new custom (opaque) rule block; the body is passed verbatim to the plugin

Must Not Depend On.description: Forbid dependencies to one or more targets (comma-separate additional targets)

Must Only Depend On.description: Allow dependencies only to specified targets (comma-separate additional targets)

Must Only Be Accessed By.description: Limit incoming dependencies to specified targets

Path Must Exist.description: Assert that a path must exist

Path Must Not Exist.description: Assert that a path must not exist

Path Must Contain.description: Assert that a path must contain text or regex

Path Must Not Contain.description: Assert that a path must not contain text or regex

Must Implement Interface.description: Assert that a class must implement an interface

Must Extend Class.description: Assert that a class must extend a base class

Must Be Annotated With.description: Assert that subject must have an annotation/attribute

Must Not Be Annotated With.description: Assert that subject must not have an annotation/attribute

Must Be In.description: Assert that a class must be located in a component

Must Match Pattern.description: Assert that subject must match a naming pattern

Exclude Class Implementing.description: Exclude classes implementing an interface from the rule

Exclude Class.description: Exclude a specific class from the rule

Exclude Path.description: Exclude paths from a file rule
